# neon_organization_invitations (Data Source)

Retrieves the list of invitations for a Neon organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_organization_invitations" "example" {
  org_id = "your-organization-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `org_id` (String) The Neon organization ID.

### Read-Only

- `invitations` (Attributes List) The list of organization invitations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--invitations))

<a id="nestedatt--invitations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `invitations`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) The email of the invited user.
- `id` (String) The invitation ID.
- `invited_at` (String) A timestamp indicating when the invitation was created, in RFC 3339 format.
- `invited_by` (String) The user ID of the person who sent the invitation.
- `org_id` (String) The organization ID.
- `role` (String) The role assigned to the invited user.
